title: phanera calciphila
intro: Phanera calciphila, also known as the calciphilous Phanera or calciphilous bamboo orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phanera calciphila include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Phanera calciphila is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts can be found in various traditional remedies, including Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
